items.text: Column is nullable / not-nullable as per requirement spec
Column data type matches spec (e.g. accepts long int / bigint range)
Primary key uniqueness is enforced
Foreign key constraints are enforced correctly
Default values are applied correctly on insert
Column length / precision is validated (no silent truncation)
Indexes exist on frequently queried columns
No orphan records remain after a delete
Cascading delete / update behaves as expected
Duplicate records are prevented by unique constraints
Data is not truncated or rounded unexpectedly on insert
Insert persists all fields correctly
Update modifies only the intended fields
Delete removes the correct record(s) only
Read query returns the expected row count
Rollback works correctly on failure mid-transaction
Commit persists data after a successful transaction
Concurrent writes do not cause deadlocks
Isolation level prevents dirty reads
Migration script runs cleanly on a fresh database
Migration is idempotent (safe to re-run)
Rollback script reverts changes cleanly
Existing data is unaffected by the schema change

modules.name: UI Testing
modules.description: Layout, forms, navigation and cross-browser behaviour

items.text: Page renders correctly across target browsers
Responsive layout works on mobile / tablet / desktop breakpoints
No overlapping, cropped or clipped elements
Fonts, spacing and colors match the design spec
Images load with proper alt text
Text truncates or wraps gracefully instead of breaking the layout
Print stylesheet (if applicable) renders content cleanly
Required field validation triggers on submit
Inline error messages display correctly
Field accepts only valid input formats
Max length is enforced on text fields
Success confirmation shown after valid submission
Placeholder text disappears on focus/input and doesn't substitute for a label
Autofill correctly populates the expected fields
Copy / paste works correctly in input fields
All links navigate to the correct destination
Browser back button behaves as expected
Breadcrumbs reflect the current page location
Active nav item is highlighted correctly
Deep-linked / bookmarked URLs load the correct state
404 / not-found page displays for invalid routes
Buttons are clickable and give visual feedback
Loading state shown during async actions
Modals open and close correctly
Tooltips display correctly on hover / focus
Drag-and-drop interactions behave correctly
Keyboard shortcuts don't conflict with browser / OS defaults
Verified on Chrome
Verified on Firefox
Verified on Safari
Verified on Edge
Verified on iOS Safari
Verified on Android Chrome
Verified with browser zoom levels other than 100%
Verified with common browser extensions / ad-blockers enabled

modules.name: API Testing
modules.description: Status codes, payloads, auth and error handling

items.text: API returns HTTP 200 on a successful request
Appropriate 4xx returned for invalid input
401 / 403 returned for unauthorized access
500 is not returned for a valid request
Response time is within the agreed SLA
Response time is consistent across repeated identical requests
304 Not Modified returned correctly when caching headers match
Response schema matches the API contract
All required fields are present in the response
Data types match the spec (string / int / bool / date)
Pagination metadata is correct (total, page, limit)
Null / empty values are handled gracefully
Extra / unexpected fields in the payload are ignored, not rejected
Array fields default to an empty array, not null, when no data exists
Nested object structures match the documented depth and shape
API accepts a valid request payload
Invalid / malformed payload returns a clear error
Missing required fields rejected with 400
Query params filter results correctly
Idempotency respected for repeat PUT / DELETE
Bulk / batch endpoint handles partial success correctly (mixed pass/fail)
Request size limit is enforced with a clear error
Sorting parameter returns results in the correct order
Valid token grants access
Expired / invalid token is rejected
Correct Content-Type header returned
Rate limiting is enforced
CORS headers configured correctly
Refresh token flow issues a new valid access token
Scope / permission restrictions limit access to only permitted resources
API key rotation doesn't break in-flight requests using the old key
Error response includes a meaningful message
Error response follows the standard error schema
No stack trace leaked in a production error response
Validation errors specify which field failed and why
Timeout on a slow downstream call returns a proper 504, not a hang

modules.name: Security Testing
modules.description: AuthN/AuthZ, input validation and data protection

items.text: Unauthorized user cannot access a protected endpoint
Role-based access control is enforced correctly
Session expires after the configured timeout
Password reset flow doesn't leak account existence
Brute-force login attempts are throttled
Privilege escalation is not possible by manipulating request parameters
Account lockout policy applies consistently across all auth entry points
SQL injection payloads are safely rejected
XSS payloads are sanitized / escaped in output
File upload restricted to allowed types and size
Path traversal attempts are blocked
Command injection payloads are rejected
LDAP injection payloads are safely rejected
XML external entity (XXE) attacks are prevented
Server-side request forgery (SSRF) attempts are blocked
Sensitive data encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS)
Sensitive data encrypted at rest
PII is masked in logs
No secrets or keys committed in source
API keys are not exposed in client-side code
Data is encrypted using industry-standard, non-deprecated algorithms
Backups are encrypted and access-controlled
Session token invalidated on logout
CSRF protection enforced on state-changing requests
JWT signature is validated
Token cannot be reused after expiry
Session fixation is prevented (session ID regenerated on login)
Concurrent session limits are enforced where required
Security headers present (CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS)
Unnecessary ports / services are closed
Verbose error / debug mode disabled in production
Dependencies scanned for known vulnerabilities
TLS configuration disallows deprecated protocol versions and weak ciphers
Default / sample admin accounts are removed or disabled
Consumer-driven contract tests pass
API versioning handled without breaking consumers
Backward compatibility maintained for existing clients
Service handles downstream timeout gracefully
Retry logic works as expected on transient failure
Circuit breaker trips after the failure threshold
Correct fallback response returned when dependency is down
Eventual consistency achieved within the expected window
Distributed transaction / saga completes or compensates correctly
Duplicate event processing is idempotent
Message queue delivers at-least-once as expected
Service emits structured logs with a correlation / trace ID
Health check endpoint reports accurate status
Metrics exposed for monitoring (latency, error rate)
Distributed trace spans connect correctly across services
Service starts correctly with required env configuration
Service scales horizontally under load
Rolling deployment causes no downtime
Service degrades gracefully when a dependency is unavailable

modules.name: Performance Testing
modules.description: Load, stress, scalability and resource usage

items.text: System meets response time SLA under expected load
Throughput meets target requests/sec
No memory leak observed during sustained load
Error rate stays below threshold under load
System recovers gracefully after peak stress
Auto-scaling triggers correctly under load
No data loss during scale-up / scale-down
System degrades gracefully beyond capacity
CPU utilization stays within acceptable range under load
Memory utilization stays within acceptable range under load
Database connection pool is not exhausted under load
No excessive I/O wait under load

modules.name: Accessibility Testing
modules.description: Keyboard, screen reader and visual accessibility

items.text: All interactive elements are reachable via keyboard
Focus order follows a logical reading order
Visible focus indicator present on all controls
No keyboard trap present
Images have descriptive alt text
Form fields have associated labels
ARIA roles / attributes used correctly
Dynamic content changes are announced (live regions)
Color contrast meets WCAG AA minimum
Content remains readable when zoomed to 200%
UI is usable without relying on color alone
Text resizes without loss of content or function
App installs and launches without crashing
Core flows work on all target OS versions
Push notifications are delivered and open correctly
Deep links open the correct screen
App handles orientation change without data loss
App resumes correctly from background
App handles incoming call / notification interruption
Low battery / low storage handled gracefully
App handles offline mode gracefully
App recovers correctly when network reconnects
API calls retried appropriately on poor connectivity

modules.name: Regression Testing
modules.description: Confirming existing behaviour still holds after a change

items.text: Previously passing critical user flows still pass
No new console / application errors introduced
Existing automated test suite passes
Previously fixed bugs remain fixed
Dependent modules / features unaffected by the change
Third-party integrations still function correctly
Data migrations haven't broken existing records

modules.name: Usability Testing
modules.description: Clarity, workflow efficiency and user experience quality

items.text: Error messages tell the user what went wrong and how to fix it
Primary action on each screen is visually obvious
Empty states explain what to do next
Destructive actions require confirmation
System status is visible at all times (loading, saved, syncing)
Core task can be completed in the expected number of steps
User can recover from a mistake without losing prior input
Form data persists across accidental navigation / refresh
Multi-step flows show progress (step X of Y)
Terminology is consistent across screens
Date, time, and currency formats are consistent
Help text / tooltips are accurate and up to date
Onboarding explains core functionality without overwhelming the user
Default settings are sensible for a new user
Sign-up / setup flow can be completed without external documentation

modules.name: Localization & Internationalization Testing
modules.description: Translation, locale formatting, and layout under different languages

items.text: All user-facing strings are externalized (no hardcoded text)
Translations are accurate and contextually correct
No truncated or overlapping text in longer-language translations (e.g. German)
Pluralization rules are handled correctly per locale
Right-to-left (RTL) languages render with correct layout mirroring
Dates display in the locale-appropriate format
Numbers and currency use correct separators and symbols
Time zones are converted and displayed correctly
Units of measurement match locale expectations (metric / imperial)
Unicode / special characters display correctly (no mojibake)
Non-Latin input (e.g. Devanagari, CJK) is accepted in text fields
Sorting / collation respects locale-specific rules
Legal / compliance text matches the target region's requirements
Region-locked content or features behave correctly
Address / phone number formats validate per region

modules.name: DevOps & CI/CD Testing
modules.description: Build pipelines, deployments, and environment configuration

items.text: Build fails fast on lint / compile errors
Automated test suite runs on every pull request
Pipeline blocks merge on failing required checks
Build artifacts are versioned and traceable to a commit
Deployment to staging succeeds without manual intervention
Rollback to the previous version works within the target time
Blue-green / canary deployment routes traffic correctly
Database migrations run automatically as part of deployment
Environment variables are correctly scoped per environment
Secrets are pulled from a secure vault, not committed
Feature flags toggle behavior without a redeploy
Staging environment mirrors production configuration
Smoke tests run automatically after deployment
Alerts fire when error rate spikes post-deploy
Deployment notifications reach the right channel/team

modules.name: Data Pipeline / ETL Testing
modules.description: Extraction, transformation, loading, and data quality

items.text: Source data is extracted completely (no dropped records)
Incremental extraction correctly captures only new / changed records
Extraction handles source schema changes gracefully
Transformation logic produces mathematically correct aggregates
Null / missing values are handled per business rule
Data type conversions do not lose precision
Deduplication logic removes true duplicates only
Row counts reconcile between source and destination
Failed load can be retried without duplicating data
Partial pipeline failure doesn't leave data in an inconsistent state
Data quality checks flag anomalies (outliers, sudden volume drops)
Pipeline run time is monitored against expected SLA
Lineage / audit trail identifies where a data point originated

modules.name: Documentation Testing
modules.description: Accuracy and usability of user-facing and technical documentation

items.text: Documented steps match actual application behavior
Screenshots reflect the current UI
API documentation matches the actual request/response schema
Code samples run without errors
All public endpoints / features are documented
Edge cases and error responses are documented
Prerequisites and setup steps are complete
Table of contents / navigation makes content discoverable
Search returns relevant results for common queries
All internal and external links resolve correctly
User consent is captured before data collection
User can export / download their own data
User can request account and data deletion
Data retention periods are enforced automatically
Sensitive actions are logged with user, timestamp, and action
Audit logs are tamper-evident / immutable
Access to audit logs is itself restricted and logged
Required disclosures / terms are shown before a regulated action
Financial calculations match the regulatory-specified formula
Reports required by regulators are generated in the correct format

modules.name: Chaos & Resilience Testing
modules.description: System behavior under induced failure and adverse conditions

items.text: System tolerates the loss of a single node / instance
System recovers automatically after a zone / region outage simulation
Failover to a secondary/replica occurs within the target time
Application remains partially functional when a non-critical dependency fails
Injected network latency doesn't cause cascading timeouts
Clock skew between services doesn't break time-sensitive logic
System self-heals without manual intervention where designed to
No data corruption occurs after a forced kill / restart
Backups can be restored successfully within the target RTO

modules.name: Third-Party Integration Testing
modules.description: External services, webhooks, and vendor API dependencies

items.text: Integration authenticates successfully with valid credentials
Expired / revoked credentials are detected and surfaced to the user
Sandbox and production endpoints are not cross-wired
Incoming webhook payloads are verified (signature / secret check)
Duplicate webhook deliveries are handled idempotently
Missed / failed webhook deliveries are retried or reconciled
Fields map correctly between internal model and vendor schema
Vendor API version changes are detected before they break integration
Sync conflicts (local vs remote edits) are resolved per defined rule
Vendor outage doesn't block unrelated core functionality
Clear user-facing message shown when a third-party service is unavailable
